description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with long, straight hair extending down her back, dressed in a short-sleeved top and a short skirt. She wears ankle-high boots and has a distinctive set of angular, mechanical appendages or accessories extending from her back and sides, giving her a futuristic or cybernetic appearance. Her arms are bent at the elbows, and her hands are positioned near her waist, with one hand slightly raised. The figure's facial features are delicate and anime-inspired, with large eyes and a small mouth. The overall build is slender, and the posture is upright and confident. The mechanical elements appear to be part of her attire or an exoskeleton, adding a unique visual complexity.
description: A slender, upright adult female with long straight hair, futuristic mechanical appendages, and anime-inspired features, dressed in a short-sleeved top, skirt, and boots.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's face, chest, and the symmetrical arrangement of mechanical appendages extending outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the hair, the profile of the face, and the side projection of the mechanical elements.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the hair, the back of the outfit, and the outward spread of the mechanical appendages.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair, and mechanical features from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved fitted top and short skirt with futuristic mechanical accessories
